## Issue Type

- [ ] Question
- [ ] Performance issue
- [ ] Documentation issue
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Description

Please provide a clear description of your issue, question, or concern.

## Details

Include any relevant details:

- What specific aspect of the game does this relate to?
- What information would help us address this?
- Any relevant logs or error messages?

## Environment

- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Operating System**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or information that might be helpful.

---

**Note**: For bugs or feature requests, please use the specific templates instead.
